Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}So, I tried putting my thoughts in order.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}I was so confused last time, I couldn't find the right words.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}I've said before, but I have a bad habit of thinking negatively. Like when I have a difficult time deciding on something.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}But no one knows what the future holds.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}No matter how much you prepare, you can never really be sure what'll happen.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}So in situations like that, I think the most important thing you can do... is believe.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}You have to think positively, and trust that the future will smile upon you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}The thing is, I'm not sure I can do that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}I don't understand how it comes so naturally to everyone else.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}How are you able to tell yourself that things will work out in the end?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 5 13 3 5 6}Sounds like it's just in your nature, I guess.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}You don't have to think about it because it just comes naturally to you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}I really admire that part of you, {f 4 1}-kun.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}The reason I've been relying on you isn't just because you're our leader.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I understand Fuuka's heartfelt words.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Здається ми зблизилися один з одним...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}You know, sometimes I think to myself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}Once I learn how to cook, and I've paid you back for your help...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Will that be the end of us spending time together like this?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SEL_011_0_0
Dialog.Option: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We'll see each other in the dorm.

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}But... I'm sure there are lots of other people who depend on you, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}I can't get in the way of that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}Sorry! I didn't mean to sound so depressed.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}{f 5 13 3 5 6}But it wouldn't be the same. There's other people at the dorm...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}And I know how everyone depends on you, {f 4 1}-kun.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}I can't get in the way of that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}Sorry! I didn't mean to sound so depressed.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}Oh, look at the time. We should start heading back.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}Hey, uh, do you mind if we make a small detour? I want to buy some ingredients.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}I think I'll tackle making Koro-chan's dinner today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I went shopping with Fuuka,[n]then headed home...[n]{f 1 1}
